name: V2ToUcumUnits
title: HL7 V2 Unit Codes to UCUM
description: Maps HL7 Version 2 ANSI X3.50 / ISO+ unit codes (as used in V2 CWE.3/CWE.6 with coding system ANS+ or ISO+) to their equivalent UCUM codes.

element.display: 10 liter per minute per square meter

target.display: 10 liter per minute per square meter

element.display: dyne second per centimeter to the fifth per square meter

target.display: dyne second per centimeter to the fifth per square meter

element.display: dyne second per centimeter to the fifth

target.display: dyne second per centimeter to the fifth

element.display: centimeter of water second per liter

target.display: centimeter of water second per liter

element.display: centimeter of water per second per meter

target.display: centimeter of water per second per meter

element.display: gram meter per hemoglobin per square meter

target.display: gram meter per hemoglobin per square meter

element.display: milliliter per hemoglobin per square meter

target.display: milliliter per hemoglobin per square meter

element.display: kilogram per second per square meter

target.display: kilogram per second per square meter

element.display: liter per minute per square meter

target.display: liter per minute per square meter

element.display: milliliter per minute per square meter

target.display: milliliter per minute per square meter
